creator: theraven@FreeBSD.org
text:
The patch enables -integrated-as on all architectures.  This stands a good chance of breaking MIPS and possibly others.  

Adding the fix in the CMake file is not a good solution, because this failure affects every single Objective-C program.  The correct solution is most likely to switch the ports infrastructure to using -integrated-as on ARM and then fix any ports that use ARM assembly that clang can't handle (which shouldn't be much, as all of iOS is built with clang -integrated-as and has been for several years).
